response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff-level individual contributor with strong backend and distributed systems expertise, but he lacks the executive leadership background required for this CTO role. He does not meet the hard requirements of having 5+ years in senior technical management, a track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers, or operating production multi-agent AI systems in regulated financial environments.
strengths: Proven expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput microservices architecture.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding and maintaining an open-source platform.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol tooling.
concerns: Completely lacks executive engineering leadership and experience scaling teams to 30+ people.
Missing production experience deploying multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes financial contexts.
No track record of board-level technical communication or governing external delivery partners.
